title: Parole!
writer: Kubec Glasmon, Horace McCoy, Joel Sayre
actors: Henry Hunter, Ann Shepherd, Alan Dinehart
plot: In a state penitentiary on New Year's Eve, gangster "Okay" Percy Smith knifes fellow inmate Zingo Browning, killing him. The next day, convicted lawyers Russell Whalen and Marty Crawford plead their cases before the Parole Board. ...
